item.title: Medline Industries, LP: Medline medical convenience kits, containing Namic Manifold, Labeled as: HEART CATH PACK-LF, Medline Kit Number/SKU DYNJ36478B Recall
item.product: Medline medical convenience kits, containing Namic Manifold, Labeled as: HEART CATH PACK-LF, Medline Kit Number/SKU DYNJ36478B
item.summary: Medline has identified the presence of particulate within the fluid path of the Manifolds. Product details: Medline medical convenience kits, containing Namic Manifold, Labeled as: HEART CATH PACK-LF, Medline Kit Number/SKU DYNJ36478B
item.affectedPeople: US (nationwide) and AE, AU, CA, JP, KR, NL, SG, SK.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
